# Copy functions matching regex into a new sink file in another directory.
# (Copying within the source's own directory is rejected — see
# copy_samedir_bail.txt — because the package would gain duplicates.)
exec sflit -source big.go -sink sub/small.go -regex '^Filter'
cmp sub/small.go expected_small.go
cmp big.go expected_big.go

exec gotypecheck big.go
exec gotypecheck sub/small.go
-- big.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
func Other()   { fmt.Println("o") }
-- expected_big.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
func Other()   { fmt.Println("o") }
-- expected_small.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
